title: AI Systems Radar
summary: Today's radar is ranked locally with TF-IDF clustering, source trust, freshness, momentum, and diversity scoring. Primary sources lead; GitHub and Hacker News remain labeled attention signals.

mustRead.title: Effective context engineering for AI agents
mustRead.whyItMatters: Grounded source for multi agent systems; ranked by 96 trust, 85 topical match, 93 recency. Engineering guidance on making long-running agents reliable through context design.

mustRead.title: Community investments in Virginia support local jobs and energy affordability
mustRead.whyItMatters: Grounded source for datacenter power compute; ranked by 94 trust, 63 topical match, 100 recency. Datacenter-adjacent investment signal tied to energy affordability and AI infrastructure expansion.

mustRead.title: Sparse Routing for Low-Latency Mixture-of-Experts Inference
mustRead.whyItMatters: Grounded source for inference systems; ranked by 82 trust, 83 topical match, 89 recency. A preprint proposing routing and batching changes to reduce serving latency for MoE language models.

mustRead.title: guardrail-lab/agent-evals
mustRead.whyItMatters: Attention signal for developer tools; ranked by 812 GitHub stars. Evaluation harness for measuring tool-use reliability and prompt-injection resistance in agent systems.

mustRead.title: New rack-scale systems target denser AI inference clusters
mustRead.whyItMatters: Grounded source for inference systems; ranked by 88 trust, 92 topical match, 73 recency. Infrastructure update about rack-scale compute, networking, and power density for inference.

watchlist.title: Serving long-context models with paged attention and speculative decoding
watchlist.whyItMatters: Grounded source for inference systems; ranked by 90 trust, 85 topical match, 71 recency. Practical notes on inference throughput, memory pressure, and context window serving.

watchlist.title: Investing in multi-agent AI safety research
watchlist.whyItMatters: Grounded source for multi agent systems; ranked by 96 trust, 68 topical match, 94 recency. Official DeepMind update about funding and research priorities for multi-agent AI safety.

watchlist.title: Why AI clusters are making InfiniBand interesting again
watchlist.whyItMatters: Attention signal for training infrastructure; ranked by 318 HN points. Community discussion around fabric design, tail latency, and cluster utilization.

deepDive.title: Sparse Routing for Low-Latency Mixture-of-Experts Inference
deepDive.summary: arXiv AI Systems Query is the strongest non-signal item in today's clustered candidate set for inference systems.
bullets: Extract: A preprint proposing routing and batching changes to reduce serving latency for MoE language models.
Local score: 0.66 across trust, topical fit, recency, momentum, novelty, and depth.
Open the source before treating any vendor or community signal as a final claim.
